name: JMSFusion
description: Frontend enhancement plugin for Jellyfin Web and web-wrapper mobile clients; native Android TV clients are not supported.
overview: Custom script loader for the Jellyfin web UI.

versions.changelog:
v3.0.0

Changes:
- Added Cinema Pre-Roll system with TMDb-based trailer playback
- Introduced server-side scoped JSON cache (replacing IndexedDB)
- Integrated trailer cards and enhanced detail modal for virtual items
- Improved slider behavior, UserData sync, and playback-aware updates
- Expanded cache coverage (home, recommendations, GMMP, slider data)
- Implemented automatic cache migration and new cache management tools
- Optimized recommendation logic and runtime cache handling
- Fixed "Who’s Watching" layout issue (issues #53)
- Updated smart auto-pause behavior (0 disables condition) (issues #52)

Notes:
- TMDb API key required for Cinema Pre-Roll
- Restart Jellyfin after update
- Hard refresh (Ctrl + F5) may be required

v2.9.1

Changes:
- Improved home slider initialization stability
- Prevented duplicate slider initialization while pending
- Delayed restore and repair operations until slide creation is fully completed
- Improved header offset synchronization across resize, navigation, visibility changes, and DOM mutations
- Reused slide metadata color seeds for active navigation dot styling consistency
- Applied minor slider and navigation refinements

Notes:
- Restart Jellyfin after update
- A hard refresh (Ctrl + F5) may be required after updating

v2.9.0

Changes:
- Improved Normal and Compact view styles
- Added details module support for Jellyfin original content cards on mobile devices
- Added smart list creation support to the watchlist module
- Removed fullscreen view style
- Replaced SVG quality badges with text-based labels
- Applied minor improvements across several modules

Notes:
- Restart Jellyfin after update
- A hard refresh (Ctrl + F5) may be required after updating

v2.8.0

Changes:
- Optimized home page rendering by decoupling heavy item metadata from user-specific data and extending static cache revalidation
- Improved performance and consistency across different data loading scenarios

- Enhanced slider, studio collections, and managed monwui UI cards to align with native app layout and ordering behavior

- Added optional colorization for studio collection background elements
- Added optional colorization for slider metadata icons

- Implemented dynamic offset calculation for slider and home sections based on header height

- Introduced mini statistics panel for watchlist items

- Updated runtime, configuration, and watchlist integration pathways for improved consistency and maintainability

- Removed forced CSS overrides for Jellyfin home layout when slider is disabled, allowing native layout behavior

Notes:
- Restart Jellyfin after update
- A hard refresh (Ctrl + F5) may be required after updating

v2.7.0

Changes:
- Replaced absolute imports with relative paths and improved Jellyfin root resolution via base href or /web (related to #47)
- Increased compatibility for subdirectory deployments and different host setups

- Added "Next Up Episodes" homepage cards based on latest items flow (related to #48)

- Added configurable title/logo display for cards (related to #48)
- Personal recommendation cards now render title/logo based on selected setting or can be disabled

- Improved managed homepage rendering and recovery flow
- Added sequential render queue, viewport threshold, queue reset, and row release mechanisms
- Extended multi-section handling, prefix-based detection, and native section stability wait logic
- Added self-healing observers, managed section IDs, cleanup helpers, and controlled batch/render flow
- Reduced concurrency and batch sizes for more stable rendering
- Expanded section IDs and visibility controls for Top10, TMDB Top Movies, and similar rows
- Simplified and unified image loading with improved blur-up and retry logic

- Improved OSD and legacy header compatibility
- Added legacy header detection, logo injection, visibility control, and cleanup on pause screen

Notes:
- Restart Jellyfin after update
- Hard refresh (Ctrl + F5) may be required after update

v2.6.4

Fixes:
- Fixed plugin availability detection edge cases using /JMSFusion/ping and /Plugins/JMSFusion/ping endpoints
- Fixed splash screen triggering outside of home context
- Fixed MUI header compatibility issues affecting GMMP, notifications, profile, and watchlist buttons
- Fixed remote GMMP state mismatches and session filtering issues in cast module
- Fixed command context inconsistencies in cast operations
- Fixed language sync edge cases and incorrect English fallback behavior (issues #46)
- Fixed user/admin resolution inconsistencies
- Fixed edge cases in personal recommendations and parental PIN flows

Improvements:
- Added Style 1 / Style 2 options for pause overlay with new pauseModul2.css variant
- Added content logo and modern title layout support to OSD header rating area (MUI header only, v10.11.x experimental / v10.12 unstable)
- Improved splash screen protection to run only when plugin is accessible
- Improved slider detail caching with bulk preloading and background warmup support
- Improved overall MUI header alignment with modern layout system

Notes:
- Restart Jellyfin after update
- Hard refresh (Ctrl + F5) may be required after update

v2.6.3

Fixes:
- Fixed #44 ("Just doesn’t work") issue causing MonWUI to fail due to authorization errors
- Fixed 401 Unauthorized errors in MonWUI runtime modules
- Fixed incorrect authorization header handling for Jellyfin API requests
- Fixed credential/session handling edge cases that could break runtime requests

Improvements:
- Improved Docker deployment compatibility for mapped external ports
- Improved runtime authorization and session resolution logic

Notes:
- Restart Jellyfin after update
- Hard refresh (Ctrl + F5) may be required after update

v2.6.2

New Features:
- Added Top 10 Movies and TV Shows cards to Monwui UI
- Added TMDB Best-rated content cards
- Added setting to show/hide hero cards in Monwui UI

Improvements:
- Improved Monwui UI card visuals with minor design tweaks
- Improved Studio collections handling by hiding empty collections
- Applied general performance optimizations across the plugin

Fixes:
- Minor stability fixes and UI consistency improvements

Notes:
- Hard refresh (Ctrl + F5) may be required after update

v2.6.1

New Features:
- Added GMMP and Cast remote control infrastructure
- Added GmmpSyncController with state and command endpoints
- Added periodic GMMP state sync, remote command polling and unload cleanup flow
- Added physical index.html patch fallback system with configuration support

Improvements:
- Improved splash screen with timeout, fallback and cleanup handling
- Improved asset versioning reliability during initial load
- Improved index patch/unpatch lifecycle and backup management
- Improved Watchlist data model with EntrySnapshot for share persistence
- Improved own/shared Watchlist flows and data consistency
- Improved home sections, Studio Hubs and render recovery logic
- Improved initial render validation before splash closes
- Improved rendering and ordering for recommendations, recent and studio rows
- Improved playback flow with simplified HLS stream selection and stable URL generation

Fixes:
- Fixed potential data loss in shared Watchlist entries when source item is removed
- Fixed inconsistent render states during splash-to-home transition

Notes:
- Physical index.html fallback can be configured from MonWUI Settings
- Hard refresh (Ctrl + F5) may be required after update

v2.6.0

New Features:
- Added renewed Cast modal system with GMMP music player integration
- Added Cast module settings and shared watch activity tab
- Added local comments field to Details modal
- Added Settings modal keyboard shortcut support (default F2)

Improvements:
- Improved Watchlist performance with cache, progressive rendering and event delegation
- Improved Cast sync, control optimization and lazy-loaded CSS
- Improved MonWUI card reinitialization after page navigation

Fixes:
- Fixed Watchlist full rerender after remove using incremental DOM updates
- Fixed MonWUI cards failing to initialize when returning to home view

Notes:
- Cast module is now configurable from MonWUI Settings
- Hard refresh (Ctrl + F5) may be required after update

v2.5.2

New Features:
- MonWUI settings moved to plugin configuration page
- Added dedicated "MonWUI Settings" tab with embedded full settings UI
- Introduced modular settings architecture with shared helpers
- Added WebSettingsJs endpoint for direct settings module import

Improvements:
- Improved auth and profile change handling (AUTH_PROFILE_CHANGED_EVENT, watchdog, live state resolution)
- Enhanced trailer automation (ffmpeg detection, Windows auto-download, temp directories, stricter validation)
- Reworked home and hero rendering (safe text rendering, animations, improved reuse/cleanup)

Fixes:
- Fixed stale cache issues after profile/server changes
- Fixed incorrect admin detection and PIN policy inconsistencies
- Reduced flicker and duplicate iframe rendering issues

Notes:
- Settings are now managed via plugin configuration page
- Hard refresh (Ctrl + F5) may be required after update
Overhaul loading, asset versioning, splash screen, and native-style home section flows.
Improve settings modal and add sync
Improve the save functionality and fix the CSS issues in the settings module
Fix: resolved display issue with `Continue Watching` items
Improve parental PIN & UI; optimize GMMP
Enhance modals, UI cards & media session
Fix CSS updates and studio modal behavior
Refactored slider system with `monwui-` namespace
Improve UI, config & add Spanish
Add radio, watchlist, Deno and module fixes
